# NoorJyoti

> NoorJyoti is a free sacred-audio library. It reads the world's great
> scriptures aloud in soothing, natural AI voices across nine languages, so
> anyone can listen to the public-domain texts of the major spiritual
> traditions. This site is the multi-language marketing front door for the app.

## What NoorJyoti offers

- 21 scriptures across the world's major traditions, including the Bible
  (KJV), the Quran (Pickthall), the Torah and Pirkei Avot, the Bhagavad Gita,
  the Dhammapada, the Upanishads, the Heart Sutra, the Ramayana, the Guru
  Granth Sahib, and the Jain Agamas (e.g. the Acaranga Sutra).
- Continuous chapter-to-chapter recitation with a calm, distraction-free
  audio player.
- Narration in nine languages.
- Full public-domain text shown as a readable transcript beneath the player.
- Built for accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA).

## Key facts

- Cost: free.
- Source texts: public domain.
- Platforms: web app, plus native iOS and Android apps.
- Languages: English, Spanish, French, Hebrew, Yoruba, Chinese and more.

## Links

- Website (English): https://noorjyoti.com/
- App: https://noorjyoti.app/
